channel.title: NPR Programs: Morning Edition
channel.description: Morning Edition takes listeners around the country and the world with multi-faceted stories and commentaries every weekday. Hosts Steve Inskeep, Leila Fadel, Michel Martin and A Martínez bring you the latest breaking news and features to prepare you for the day.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth goes to the Hill with $350B funding request
item.description: Defense secretary Pete Hegseth will appear on the Hill on Tuesday. He's looking for a $350 billion funding boost, as the war Iran once again flares up with no end in sight.
item.content:encoded: Defense secretary Pete Hegseth will appear on the Hill on Tuesday. He's looking for a $350 billion funding boost, as the war Iran once again flares up with no end in sight.
item.dc:creator: Quil Lawrence

item.title: Sen. Chris Murphy on the Iran war and Pete Hegseth's upcoming Senate testimony
item.description: NPR's Michel Martin speaks with Sen. Chris Murphy, D-Conn., about the escalating war in the Middle East and the testimony of Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth in front of a Senate panel on Tuesday.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Michel Martin speaks with Sen. Chris Murphy, D-Conn., about the escalating war in the Middle East and the testimony of Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth in front of a Senate panel on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Michel Martin

item.title: Man accused of setting a fire outside a federal building in New York City
item.description: Authorities detained a former U.S. Army soldier who is accused of starting a fire and shooting a pellet gun outside of a federal building in New York City that houses an immigration court.
item.content:encoded: Authorities detained a former U.S. Army soldier who is accused of starting a fire and shooting a pellet gun outside of a federal building in New York City that houses an immigration court.
item.dc:creator: Gwynne Hogan

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Iran-backed Houthis say they will blockade anothe waterway, threatening Red Sea shipping, Pete Hegseth heads to the Hill looking for $350 billion funding boost, Arizona voters head to the polls.
item.content:encoded: Iran-backed Houthis say they will blockade anothe waterway, threatening Red Sea shipping, Pete Hegseth heads to the Hill looking for $350 billion funding boost, Arizona voters head to the polls.
item.dc:creator: Leila Fadel

item.title: Odd Future's Syd talks about her new album, 'Beard'
item.description: A former member of the star-making hip-hop collective Odd Future, Syd returns with a new solo album, "Beard," a title inspired by the peach fuzz on her upper lip.
item.content:encoded: A former member of the star-making hip-hop collective Odd Future, Syd returns with a new solo album, "Beard," a title inspired by the peach fuzz on her upper lip.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: New Air Force One going out of commission to get safety upgrades
item.description: The new Air Force One is going out of commission to receive safety upgrades. What needs to be done and was it safe for President Trump to fly the plane to Turkey earlier this month?
item.content:encoded: The new Air Force One is going out of commission to receive safety upgrades. What needs to be done and was it safe for President Trump to fly the plane to Turkey earlier this month?
item.dc:creator: Leila Fadel

item.title: A Detroit family self-deported to Venezuela. Two weeks later, disaster struck
item.description: A Detroit family of undocumented immigrants self-deported to Venezuela after a parent was detained in the U.S. Two weeks after they landed, two massive earthquakes devastated the area.
item.content:encoded: A Detroit family of undocumented immigrants self-deported to Venezuela after a parent was detained in the U.S. Two weeks after they landed, two massive earthquakes devastated the area.
item.dc:creator: Beenish Ahmed

item.title: Colorado wildfire victims return to their homes for the first time
item.description: Colorado's biggest wildfire this year has destroyed more than 300 homes. People who lost them are just now being allowed back to their properties.
item.content:encoded: Colorado's biggest wildfire this year has destroyed more than 300 homes. People who lost them are just now being allowed back to their properties.
item.dc:creator: Briana Heaney

item.title: FDA still focused on Taylor Farms lettuce as Cyclospora source despite retracted test
item.description: The FDA retracted its only positive test for cyclospora, the parasite at the center of a multistate outbreak, on Taylor Farms lettuce. But the agency believes lettuce from the brand is still linked.
item.content:encoded: The FDA retracted its only positive test for cyclospora, the parasite at the center of a multistate outbreak, on Taylor Farms lettuce. But the agency believes lettuce from the brand is still linked.
item.dc:creator: Yuki Noguchi

item.title: Trump cuts to advisory groups leaves hospitals without key expertise on disease
item.description: Under the Trump administration, dozens of advisory committees have been ended or frozen, including one on controlling infection in healthcare settings.
item.content:encoded: Under the Trump administration, dozens of advisory committees have been ended or frozen, including one on controlling infection in healthcare settings.
item.dc:creator: Katia Riddle
